samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit divider with combinational logic for division.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">Dividend input.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Divider input.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Quotient output.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Division operation performed using combinational logic.</implementation>
</module>
samples.tb_log:
[COMPILE verilator+cpp]
%Warning-WIDTH: div_16bit.v:16:24: Operator DIV expects 16 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'b_reg' generates 8 bits.
                                 : ... In instance div_16bit
   16 |         result = a_reg / b_reg;
      |                        ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-WIDTH: div_16bit.v:17:21: Operator MODDIV expects 16 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'b_reg' generates 8 bits.
                                 : ... In instance div_16bit
   17 |         odd = a_reg % b_reg;
      |                     ^
